Differential Data Analysis postprocessing

Uwe Schwartz

11/07/2024

Dependencies & Libraries

Load packages

library(DESeq2)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
library(ggrepel)
library(tidyverse)
#palette(unique(c(brewer.pal(9,"Set1"),brewer.pal(8,"Set2"))))
load("/Users/macair////Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Organisation_NAC/Cooperate_Design/colors/nac_palette_extend.rda")
palette(nac_palette_extend)

##Import data H77L vs Ctrl at DMSO

# load 
H77L.res<-read.delim("data/H77L.DMSO_vs_Ctrl.DMSO/res_table.txt")
head(H77L.res)
##    baseMean log2FoldChange     lfcSE        pvalue          padj
## 1  3175.950       3.433506 0.1252297 1.005424e-167 1.532869e-163
## 2  9240.086      -2.671048 0.1297382  1.244959e-95  9.490321e-92
## 3  1567.133      -2.274666 0.1306626  7.072396e-69  3.594192e-65
## 4  1688.684       4.704424 0.2739170  2.119346e-68  8.077888e-65
## 5 19430.082      -4.428988 0.2622692  2.280533e-66  6.953802e-63
## 6  4582.236      -4.456950 0.2642474  3.292546e-66  8.366358e-63

## 2 ENSMUSG00000030774 protein_coding   Pak1 173.13429 1255.824785 127.87507
## 3 ENSMUSG00000046719 protein_coding  Nxph3  79.77743  365.830721  72.11227
## 4 ENSMUSG00000030409 protein_coding   Dmpk 119.73872    2.442797  95.24037
## 5 ENSMUSG00000037664 protein_coding Cdkn1c 324.09359 5287.400634 382.08522
## 6 ENSMUSG00000041378 protein_coding  Cldn5 151.95178 1897.101609 125.44263
##     TPM_46402   TPM_46403   TPM_46587   TPM_46588 TPM_46621   TPM_46622

## 2 1098.668980  854.085898  985.364060  978.560795 178.45675 1183.759378
## 3  291.248735  301.848974  293.487536  259.232684  58.37525  300.666635
## 4    3.035441    2.037775    2.161717    1.276987 122.98043    2.022518
## 5 5229.225154 4148.051684 4863.157632 5570.834562 232.51103 5610.091718
## 6 1770.730998 1328.312125 1781.653336 1782.808855 100.11578 1856.719250

## 2  970.520380 227.67802 135.32516 153.77552 127.55659 124.25509 200.20153

## 4    1.300392 145.97158  66.75409  95.98016 135.69924  77.10599 115.83277
## 5 5106.615432 402.30544 248.44698 347.71633 261.39422 146.49535 438.21372
## 6 1474.031549 117.18167  74.47048 102.78300  84.82260  54.55101 126.50219
##   TPM_47993 TPM_48638 TPM_48813 TPM_48814 TPM_48975 TPM_48982   TPM_48986
## 1 179.35666 172.33183 196.98140 191.23597 203.92358 188.92999   20.197658
## 2 225.48795 263.58841 173.32215 183.07991 124.22624 197.65197 1060.184191
## 3  72.46938  95.95009  63.06606  64.62452  67.73942  64.83321  265.333024
## 4 122.17411  74.08716 109.62549 104.01723 118.34744 127.30312    1.623148
## 5 556.62294 458.90527 277.48225 285.11219  76.40572 300.04517 4156.335472
## 6 148.78376 161.76380  77.71697  99.25165  24.98318  89.02226 1232.286677
##   TPM_49335 TPM_50091 TPM_50093 TPM_50095 TPM_50096
## 1 228.76190 234.73895 195.08915 172.78255 224.08289
## 2 148.34148 211.48230 182.35301 182.42936 169.14271
## 3  58.83762  80.20405  75.33511  56.15889  61.64096
## 4  39.56984 214.44292  72.67195 265.76300 137.66015
## 5 162.17158 154.32550 146.34643 139.11596 145.96243
## 6  53.16507  52.40791  49.32089  43.55810  68.76535
load("data/H77L.DMSO_vs_Ctrl.DMSO/res.rda")

H77L.DMSO vs Ctrl.DMSO

## set thresholds
p.th<-0.001
logFC<-2

### significant hits
res.sig<-subset(res, padj<p.th & abs(log2FoldChange) > logFC)
#significant hits up regulated
table(res.sig$log2FoldChange>0)
## 
## FALSE  TRUE 
##    58   237
################################################################################
########################## volcano plot ########################################
################################################################################

df<-data.frame(subset(res, !is.na(res$padj)))

df$signif<-df$padj<=p.th & abs(df$log2FoldChange)>logFC

df$colorBI<-"ns"
df$colorBI[df$signif & df$log2FoldChange>0]<-"up"
df$colorBI[df$signif & df$log2FoldChange<0]<-"down"

df$colorBI<-factor(df$colorBI,levels = c("ns","down","up"))

n.group<-table(df$colorBI)
#################################################################

g.volc<-ggplot(df, aes(log2FoldChange,log10(padj)*c(-1)))+
    geom_point(aes(color=colorBI))+theme_bw()+ylab("-log10(p.adj)")+
    scale_color_manual(values=c("grey90","#1F78B4","#E31A1C"),
                       labels=c(paste("ns",n.group["ns"], sep="="),
                                paste("down",n.group["down"], sep="="),
                                paste("up",n.group["up"], sep="=")))+
    geom_point(data=subset(df,df$colorBI=="up"),
               aes(log2FoldChange,log10(padj)*c(-1)), color="#E31A1C")+
    geom_point(data=subset(df,df$colorBI=="down"),
               aes(log2FoldChange,log10(padj)*c(-1)), color="#1F78B4")+
    guides(colour = guide_legend("",override.aes = list(size = 3)))+ 
    theme(legend.position = "top",
          legend.text = element_text(size=15))+
    geom_segment(aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(p.th), xend=Inf, yend=-log10(p.th)),  linetype="dashed")+
    geom_segment(aes(x =-logFC, y =-log10(p.th), xend=-Inf, yend=-log10(p.th)),  linetype="dashed")+
    geom_segment(aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(p.th), xend=logFC, yend=Inf),  linetype="dashed")+
    geom_segment(aes(x =-logFC, y =-log10(p.th), xend=-logFC, yend=Inf),  linetype="dashed")+
#   geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p.th),  linetype="dashed")+
    ggtitle(paste0("FDR = ",p.th ," & |log2FC| > ",logFC))
g.volc    

############################
#get top 20 p-adjusted value
#df.sign<-subset(df, signif)
#df.top<-df.sign[order(df.sign$padj)[1:20],]
df.top<-df[df$symbol %in% c("Cdkn1c","Tagln", "B2m","Lgals3","Cldn5","Cd63",
                            "Pak1","Flna", "Serping1", "Mustn1"),]

print(g.volc+geom_text_repel(data = df.top,
                        aes(label = symbol),
                        size = 3,max.overlaps = NA,
                        box.padding = unit(0.7, "lines"),
                        point.padding = unit(0.2, "lines")))

# load

load("data/C118F.DMSO_vs_Ctrl.DMSO/res.rda")

C118F.DMSO vs Ctrl.DMSO

## set thresholds
p.th<-0.001
logFC<-2

### significant hits
res.sig<-subset(res, padj<p.th & abs(log2FoldChange) > logFC)
#significant hits up regulated
table(res.sig$log2FoldChange>0)
## 
## FALSE  TRUE 
##    69   273
################################################################################
########################## volcano plot ########################################
################################################################################

df<-data.frame(subset(res, !is.na(res$padj)))

df$signif<-df$padj<=p.th & abs(df$log2FoldChange)>logFC

df$colorBI<-"ns"
df$colorBI[df$signif & df$log2FoldChange>0]<-"up"
df$colorBI[df$signif & df$log2FoldChange<0]<-"down"

df$colorBI<-factor(df$colorBI,levels = c("ns","down","up"))

n.group<-table(df$colorBI)
#################################################################

g.volc<-ggplot(df, aes(log2FoldChange,log10(padj)*c(-1)))+
    geom_point(aes(color=colorBI))+theme_bw()+ylab("-log10(p.adj)")+
    scale_color_manual(values=c("grey90","#1F78B4","#E31A1C"),
                       labels=c(paste("ns",n.group["ns"], sep="="),
                                paste("down",n.group["down"], sep="="),
                                paste("up",n.group["up"], sep="=")))+
    geom_point(data=subset(df,df$colorBI=="up"),
               aes(log2FoldChange,log10(padj)*c(-1)), color="#E31A1C")+
    geom_point(data=subset(df,df$colorBI=="down"),
               aes(log2FoldChange,log10(padj)*c(-1)), color="#1F78B4")+
    guides(colour = guide_legend("",override.aes = list(size = 3)))+ 
    theme(legend.position = "top",
          legend.text = element_text(size=15))+
    geom_segment(aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(p.th), xend=Inf, yend=-log10(p.th)),  linetype="dashed")+
    geom_segment(aes(x =-logFC, y =-log10(p.th), xend=-Inf, yend=-log10(p.th)),  linetype="dashed")+
    geom_segment(aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(p.th), xend=logFC, yend=Inf),  linetype="dashed")+
    geom_segment(aes(x =-logFC, y =-log10(p.th), xend=-logFC, yend=Inf),  linetype="dashed")+
#   geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p.th),  linetype="dashed")+
    ggtitle(paste0("FDR = ",p.th ," & |log2FC| > ",logFC))
g.volc    

############################
#get top 20 p-adjusted value
#df.sign<-subset(df, signif)
#df.top<-df.sign[order(df.sign$padj)[1:20],]
df.top<-df[df$symbol %in% c("Cdkn1c","Tagln", "B2m","Lgals3","Cldn5","Cd63",
                            "Pak1","Flna", "Serping1", "Mustn1"),]


print(g.volc+geom_text_repel(data = df.top,
                        aes(label = symbol),
                        size = 3,max.overlaps = NA,
                        box.padding = unit(0.75, "lines"),
                        point.padding = unit(0.2, "lines")))
